'''Calus''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Calus system/Legends|Calus system]] of the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]], near [[Bestine IV/Legends|Bestine IV]]. [[Sweet-sand cookie/Legends|Sweet-sand cookies]] were made on Calus. It was located at the end of [[Keller's Void/Legends|Keller's Void]], opposite [[Wroona/Legends|Wroona]].

{{Planet-stub}}
